title: OSHA
description: Your buildings had better be up to code
body:
# OSHA

Simple roleplay oriented mod that just adds an armour set for your local building inspector.

This was made for private use but has been made public because why not.

Adds 5 items with fairly straightforward recipes
- Hard Hat
- High Vis Jacket
- Work Pants
- Steel Toe Boots
- OSHA Compliance Sign

Only UUIDs listed in osha.json5 in the config dir can interact with and use OSHA items.

To remove a compliance sign clear the text from the front and the back. Compliance signs cannot be removed any other way

![Armour Set In Game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64de69b95c6a66ac2dac141e8c11389504f97686.png)
